'''Reeche''' [[City/Legends|city]] was on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]-controlled [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Hanoon]].<ref name="SW:GB" /> By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> the city had been constructed next to one of the world's [[Water/Legends|canals]]. Inside the city was a [[Command center]], [[animal nursery]], and [[prefab shelter]]s. The city's inhabitants kept a shard of the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], an ancient [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]], as a relic. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the future [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], along with his sister [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Army/Legends|army]], [[Battle of Hanoon|ventured]] to Hanoon to recover the artifact's remains. They went to Reeche, and the city agreed to turn over the shard for a tribute of 500 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 500 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

The Republic forces gave Reeche the requested tribute, and the city gave up its shard. Later, Organa and Skywalker decided to free the rest of the asteroid and took control of the [[Terraform Processor]]. With the demise of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]], Hanoon agreed to join the New Republic.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Reeche was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during a [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign mission, and the player must give the town the requested resources as part of the mission. The resources may be collected by the player's [[R2-D5]] [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] or by the use of cheat codes. The mission and thus Reeche was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
